label: Branch
description: A potential branch river that may spawn at a river junction. Defines which smaller river type appears based on flow level and probability.

minFlow.label: Min flow
minFlow.description: Minimum flow value required for this branch to be eligible at a junction.

child.label: Child
child.description: RiverDef that will be placed as the branching tributary at a junction.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0.0 to 1.0) that this branch spawns at an eligible junction. Defaults to 1.
